nasb.text: Yet He also is wise and will bring disaster And does not retract His words, But will arise against the house of evildoers And against the help of the workers of iniquity.

esv.text: And yet he is wise and brings disaster; he does not call back his words, but will arise against the house of the evildoers and against the helpers of those who work iniquity.

cnv.text: 耶和華是智慧的，他必降下災禍， 決不收回自己的話， 卻要起來攻擊作惡者之家， 又攻擊那些助人作孽的。

ccb.text: 然而，耶和华有智慧， 会降灾， 从不收回自己的话。 祂必惩罚恶人之家及其帮凶。

csbs.text: 然而耶和华有智慧， 他降下灾祸，不收回自己的话； 他起来攻击作恶者的家， 攻击助纣为虐的人。
